review_title: SEIM solution
description: Helping us to get insights and monitor details in real time. It is user friendly along with detection it also helps to manage it with the use of AI. Wide range of supported integeration.
author: Agnoor G.
pros: 1. Provide real-time alerts to manage malware and threats. 2. We can integrate AI and ML as well to take help in detection. 3. Ease of use and implementation.
cons: 1. Little bit difficult to overcome the budget with features of splunk. 2. Issues with customer support help.

review_title: A really Helpful Resource to query Application Logs
description: I used splunk to query the application logs in a past job I had a couple of years ago. It served me pretty good, I would say.
author: Vinicius L.
pros: Splunk has an amazing user interface. It's pretty easy to find what we need on it. Its correlation_id resource is just fantastic.
cons: Occasionally its search didn't work so week for me.

review_title: Robust, Scalable Analytics for Modern Enterprises
author: Christine C.
pros: What I liked most about Splunk Enterprise is its powerful real-time search and analytics. It turns complex machine data into clear insights, with customizable dashboards and strong alerting that keeps teams proactive.
cons: What I dislike about Splunk Enterprise is the steep learning curve, especially for new users working with SPL, and performance tuning can require dedicated expertise.

review_title: Powerful Data Insights at a Premium Cost
description: It’s a robust and flexible platform that delivers powerful insights from large volumes of data, but it requires a learning curve and careful cost management as usage grows.
author: Gary T.
pros: Splunk Enterprise offers powerful real-time search and analytics, making it easy to troubleshoot and monitor complex systems.
cons: Splunk Enterprise can become very expensive at scale, especially with high data volumes and long retention periods.

review_title: Great for Logging only!
description: Splunk is a great Log streaming and Analytics tool. Could do better if has more to offer on the APM and Digital Experience monitoring realms of Observability.
author: Vaibhav S.
pros: Best in class Log analytics and real time log event monitoring. Friendly UI for all types of users. Quick dashboards with query insights in background.
cons: Not presented as a holistic Observability platform for all needs, with focus more around logging pipelines only. A bit of strategic confusion after acquisition.

review_title: SPLUNK THE LOG COLLECTING AND CORRELATION PLATFOR FOR YOUR DATACENTER
description: The overall experience was good. The services I need to handle had the need of such tools expecially for maintaining the compliance to ISO27001 and NIS2 directive.
author: Stefano S.
pros: Splunk is a great platform widely used for log collecting and management but also for implementing some security tools necessary for hardening the cyber security of your company.The main feature I liked is the log collecting that can collect from virtually any IT device and can correlate events for rendering easy the investigating during some security event.
cons: Splunk is a great log management and security platform the ony think I did'nt like is the price compared to others. However it has so many features that the price is right.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Intuitive workflow
description: Overall, Splunk Enterprise is meeting the needs of my projects. The dashboard is quite intuitive and engaging. It is also easy to navigate, making project move smoothly.
author: Adewale S.
pros: Splunk Enterprise provides me with great valie for money when compared with other software applications. Till moment, i received the support i need when required and in a good time too. It's quite easy to use and date is well managed to give more accurate predictions.
cons: At present, Splink Enterprise has not been giving any issues. My team seldom complains about the cost but when i make features comparison with its contemporaries, i could factually conclude that using Splunk Enterprise is a great deal.

review_title: 3 Years Splunk admin and giving a 5 star for the Splunk Enterprise!
description: I have Splunk forwarder installed over 100 servers to have logs sending over to Splunk Enterprise server, and the data ingest is very reliable. data query is also very fast and Dashboard is easy to build, alerts sending from Splunk SMTP server is reliable.
author: Philip Y.
pros: Easy setup and the search speed is fast, very reliable to ingest data. Dashboard is powerful, but building a fancy dashboard takes time, the Splunk community is a good resource.
cons: Price is a little bit high. The community feather is good though, I can find useful info from it. I wish the support can be easier.

review_title: Splunk enterprise gave us answers to our log management.
description: Splunk improved our Siem solution and we where able to become compliant due to such a strong audit trail. It became a foundational element of our cybersecurity architecture.
author: Rahul V.
pros: We are utilizing splunk for real-time log analysis and threat detection. We were able to use the correlation search and visualization services to figure out suspicious activity across systems before it got out of hand.
cons: It’s heavy for resources and not for beginners will required staff that are trained for setting up and optimizing it.

review_title: Impactful and productive
description: Amazing and gives a lot of impact. After the integration, the support from splunk team is very good and gives a lot of edge.
author: Suraj D.
pros: It’s definitely value for money and the impact is very high. You can increase the productivity due to this.
cons: It is a bit complex and needs time to learn. Splunk integration is complicated and need expert advise.

review_title: Splunk Enterprise is not just a tracing tool
description: My overall experience with Splunk Enterprise is really good. It is a powerfull tool to help you to tracing calls, using filters and customizable indexes.
author: Michele C.
pros: Intuitive, customizable and really usefull in everyday work. The different section "smart, quick and detailed" gives you the freedom to choice how to interact with the tool.
cons: Some bugs on the Alerts section to edit makes the experience worse than I expect.

review_title: Splunk Enterprise is my go-to for analyzing large volumes of data quickly and effectively.
author: Francisco S.
pros: The software is user-friendly and has powerful data visualization tools.
cons: I wish the pricing was more affordable for small businesses like mine, and some features can be overwhelming for beginners.

review_title: Powerful tool to perform db queries
description: I used Splunk to surface and review platform logs
author: Filippo S.
pros: Possibility to export query results in a variety of formats.
cons: User interface is not intuitive and it requires a steep learning curve

review_title: Bettering Cybersecurity With Splunk Enterprise
author: Lilian K.
pros: It has amazing firewall protection features It makes handling security monitoring and improving networks security easy log monitoring is easy
cons: No regrets as Splunk Enterprise meets needs.

review_title: Splunk, a must try for all data management persons
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: 1. Excellent ML background 2. Dashboard looks classy 3. Multiple external entries possible unlike a lot other tools
cons: 1. Very limited variations in reporting 2. Real-time model is not great 3. Not mobile friendly
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Best friend for debugging
description: Splunk basically makes debugging and monitoring easier and touch less. I can easily debug by starring the rolling logs from different instances in single screen. I can monitor multiple components and multiple metrics, without running commands manually with custom plugins.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Splunk comes with lot of in-built templates for each and every feature like log visualisation, dashboarding, traces,etc This makes the developers life lot easier. I can't think of any other logging tool that is snappy as well as accurate. I love the fact how easily I can plug it in my docker-compose to push container logs.
cons: Even though, it offers numerous features for different needs, each feature has its own learning curve. For instance log visualisation needs querying skills, which may be in natural language but it takes bit of time to get familiar.

review_title: Splunk for Log Monitoring
description: Splunk is best data monitoring and visualization tool. We can set alert for log and monitor log . It provides different modes for searching Fast, Smart and verbose. By using Splunk we are getting all system log in one place .Splunk has capability to handle large and big size data. It has best GUI , one can easily adopt and do customization and based on requirments.
author: vikram S.
pros: We are using Splunk for log monitoring . It is integrated with Kubernetes and pivot cloud via data bus. By Splunk we get Realtime log application. It provides best visualization of data generated by system. Splunk also provide option to filter data based on data range and time. We can configure email alert for specific issue. Splunk also provide ML model for data. Splunk use simple query to get data ,everyone can easily learn Splunk query.
cons: I haven't found any issue yet the only problem with Splunk I have that log in Splunk is scattered . We need to build good query or better logging mechanism at application side.

review_title: Splunk: A Monitoring Tool for all your needs
description: If i have put a word it would say "Fantastic". The functionalities Splunk provides eases team to manage/monitor their IT infrastructure and internal application you will be well aware about the performance of your applications. Setup alerting and take necessary actions in stipulated time to overcome all the issues which may affect your application performance.
author: Sachin S.
pros: Splunk offers various features whether you need to setup monitoring on your server, application logs based on logs ingestion set alerts so that teams got notified on real time and take actions accordingly. In this way, it helps to monitor application which are mission critical. You can make dashboards in Splunk where you can configure various components such indexes, data inputs and schedule reports as well. To achieve additional functionalities we can install third party apps as well such as AWS Add on for cloud watch log ingestion.
cons: From Admin perspective, I found user access management a little difficult. The roles of access management becomes complicated because some time the config files for that didn't came very handy. Other then that I think all in all Splunk provides fulfill all of the requirements.

review_title: Splunk is a lifesaver!
description: It’s been wonderful. I was able to take most of my forwarded lambdas and charts them to watch duration and throughput. Notifications and alerts let me know if things are out of whack. Such a relief to know Splunk is watching my back!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: If you need real-time grokking into your infrastructure, look no further than Splunk. I love love love the dashboards. It’s easy to tell a story with your data, and the live search is so FAST!
cons: SPL is a little hard to get used to, but once you get the hang of it, it’s not so bad. I recommend downloading their community edition for some great examples of queries and dashboards.

review_title: Platform that generates very good reports and data extraction
author: Alvaro C.
pros: Produces analytical information with highly interactive tables, charts and graphics. Highly customizable to obtain specific data.
cons: It can be complex at first to customize search queries since Slpunk handles its own terms and typing methods.

review_title: Helps you predict IT problems
description: Splunk Enterprise's real-time monitoring keeps us ahead of potential problems. A must-have tool!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Splunk Enterprise is a great tool for security analytics, IT operations, and business intelligence. I especially like the way it can help me identify potential threats and improve our IT infrastructure.
cons: The pricing for Splunk Enterprise may be out of reach for some small businesses.

review_title: With Splunk Enterprise , we can rapidly detect and get rid of bottlenecks.
description: Splunk Enterprise is the basis of our SIEM. We use it for log correlation and analysis. It collect events from multiple sources for analysis. I love using Splunk enterprise. It is the best platform that we have for monitoring data and identifying issues in real time.
author: stephanie B.
pros: The tool can collect all sorts of data from diffuse sources and preform advanced analytics on it. It has powerful monitoring capabilities useful in threat identification and maintaining the health of our IT infrastructure. Splunk enterprise helps us to foresee, trends through machine learning which has been a crucial to making informed business decisions.
cons: Training new users is tough, the learning curve is very steep and it gets overwhelming for them. The installation and configuration process is very long and needs a lot of time.

review_title: Swiss Knife for everything about logs
author: Thomas R.
pros: The product has a ton of Features. Everything what you Need when working with logs is already implemented
cons: Due to the rich set of capabilities regarding, searching, transforming and vizualzing data it‘s sometimes quite tricky to find all necessary query commands

review_title: Offers more than you think
description: We've used the software to detect layer 7 attacks, unearth issues we didn't realize were happening and gives us end to end insight into our stack.
author: David B.
pros: The system is highly intuitive to use. It is faster than other solutions I've used on the market and has a huge library of 3rd party plugins to get more from the system. It is easy to create scheduled searches, dashboards, reports etc. but there are a number of additional plugins (at an extra cost) to help with security, single pane of glass and metric collection.
cons: It offers challenges for a decentralized working model. Where Splunk is centrally managed, it is easy to ensure that best practices are maintained. Where the system is opened up for an entire department to utilize and on-board their logs, it becomes more difficult. However, with some creative thinking and good process, this issue can be overcome.

review_title: Splunk is a critical tool for monitoring and alerting
description: Splunk is a great product for enterprise monitoring and alerting.
author: Vince C.
pros: They have a robust platform that I have used for monitoring and analytics. There are a lot of options and customization available when using it.
cons: Because there is so much customization and options available, it can be complicated to learn.
